I can do that — a quick note before I schedule:

- 2024-05-19 at 10:00–11:00 is already booked (Project Kick-off). There is also a meeting 11:00–11:30 that day, so a 10:00 start won’t work.
- I can instead book a 1‑hour slot later that day. Common available options (based on your calendar for 2024-05-19) are:
  - 09:00–10:00
  - 11:30–12:30
  - 12:30–13:30
  - Any afternoon slot (e.g., 14:00–15:00) — let me know a preferred time if you have one.

A few quick clarifying questions so I schedule exactly how you want:
1. Which time above should I use if 10:00 is unavailable? If you want me to pick the first available, say “pick the first available.”
2. Who should be invited? (email addresses)
3. Event title (or I can use “Follow-up Meeting”)
4. Short description to include (or I can draft one such as “Follow-up to review action items and next steps”)
5. Location or virtual link (optional)

Tell me your choices and I’ll create the event.
